examples: His surgical instruments were a knife and a pair of pincers.
Some robots have three claws that can act as pincers to pick things up.
After what seems like an eternity, Lars emerges in a chaos of crab legs, pincers and human arms.
Marquee value stocks like Alcoa, Dow Chemical and DuPont are caught in the pincers of rising feedstock costs and declining product pricing.
